stemHtml: The main idea behind duplicating or even triplicating a system or components of a system is..

options.a: the extensive use of multiple computers and data recorders on board, which need raw source data or information.
options.b: because of the Airworthiness Directives that manufacturers must comply with.
options.c: because of the limitations in strength of modern materials and system components.
options.d: in the case of a critical system or component failing, the function can be taken over by another system or component.
